commands.title: Libretto Spec: Use Libretto Spec language for this file

librettoSpec.languageServer.jarPath.description: Absolute path to libretto.spec.ide-*-ls.jar (shaded LSP). Use ${workspaceFolder} for the first workspace root. If empty, the extension tries ../libretto.spec.ide/target/*-ls.jar relative to this extension folder.

librettoSpec.languageServer.javaPath.description: Java executable used to run the LSP jar (must be Java 21+ for this project).

librettoSpec.languageServer.trace.description: LSP message trace in Output → Libretto Spec LSP. Use "verbose" to confirm textDocument/publishDiagnostics from the server.

librettoSpec.languageServer.logDiagnosti.description: Log each publishDiagnostics batch (URI + count) to the Libretto Spec LSP output channel.

librettoSpec.autoSetLanguageForDotLibret.description: When a .libretto file opens, set language id to librettospec if it was something else (so the LSP attaches). Disable if you intentionally open .libretto as Plain Text or another language.
